name: Optus Sport
blurb: Every Premier League match live, plus LaLiga, the Matildas, and J.League. Stream on up to 3 devices.

name: Optus Sport Premium
blurb: Add 4K streaming, extra concurrent screens and expanded competitions to your Optus Sport subscription.

name: Optus SubHub
blurb: Bundle Netflix, Paramount+, BINGE and more on one Optus bill and save with rotating SubHub offers.

name: Netflix via SubHub
blurb: Add Netflix to your Optus SubHub and manage it alongside your mobile and internet services.

name: Paramount+ via SubHub
blurb: Stream live sport, movies and Originals, added straight to your Optus account.

name: BINGE via SubHub
blurb: Add BINGE for the best of HBO, Max Originals and blockbuster movies through SubHub.
